title: Dinosaur or Not?
blurb: Big, nasty, and dead — right? Not so fast. Learn what really makes a dinosaur a dinosaur.

title: The Baddest of the Bad
blurb: On the hunt for the nastiest, meanest, baddest dinosaurs of all. Think you're tough enough?

title: Build a Better Dinosaur
blurb: Mix and match dinosaur parts — which would you pick, and what would you end up with?

title: On the Dinosaur Trail
blurb: Saddle up, cowpokes — a fast ride along the dinosaur trail.

title: Smart or Dumb?
blurb: Test your dinosaur IQ. Were they really too dumb to survive? Not necessarily…

title: Bringing Up Baby
blurb: Follow the eggshell trail — but walk softly. We don't want to wake the baby dinosaurs.

title: Dinosaur Mysteries
blurb: We find a new kind of dinosaur every seven weeks — here's how much we still don't know.

title: Let's Dig Up a Dinosaur
blurb: Grab your fossil-hunting gear — we're going dinosaur digging.

title: A Day in the Life of a Dinosaur
blurb: What was it like to BE a dinosaur? Troodon, the smartest one we know, shows us around.

title: Fabulous Flyers & Stupendous Swimmers
blurb: Dinosaurs weren't the only spectacular animals back then — meet the flyers and swimmers.

title: Dinosaur Neighborhoods
blurb: Where did dinosaurs live? Anywhere they wanted — probably right where your house is now.

title: Dinosaur Fashion Parade
blurb: From head to toe, dinosaurs sported the latest in prehistoric fashion. Let's take a look.

title: Friend or Foe?
blurb: You come across a dinosaur, minding your own business. Are you friends — or are you lunch?

title: Time Traveling
blurb: Strap in, time travelers — we're heading back through the Mesozoic.

title: Dinosaur Olympics
blurb: The greatest sporting event in 65 million years: the fastest, biggest, strongest dinosaurs.

title: Dinosaur Pets
blurb: Looking for a pet from dinosaur times? Imagine your very own live dinosaur — which would you pick?
